sections.instruction: Questions 1 and 2: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER. Questions 3-10: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. For questions 4, 7 and 9 write: A if the repair will be done immediately, B if the repair will be done during the following week, C if the repair will be done in two or more weeks.

questions.content:
IMA RENTAL AGENCY notes:
Name: Don Chester
Address: Apartment 4, (1) {{BLANK}} Newbridge
Length of lease: one year
Date moved in: (2) {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Questions 11 and 12: Choose correct letter A, B or C. Questions 13-15: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 16-20: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: At the Wildlife Haven there are not any

options: A collect their luggage from the bus
B wait to be shown to their rooms

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 26-30: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: The counselor says that new students
options: B are expected to work more on their own
C are usually not able to cope
A is not open at the right times

questions.content: The counselor suggests to Bill that
options: A most other students are able to cope
B he needs to find new places to work
C he needs to plan more

questions.content: Before being able to help Bill the counselor need
options: B talk with his medical friend
C get more information from him

sections.instruction: Questions 31-35: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 36-40: Which group gave the following advice? Tick column A if it was mainly women, Tick column B if it was mainly men, Tick column C if it was both men and women.

questions.content: Jim was first interested in the subject because of something
Which pie chart shows the proportion of men and women respondents?
The most common type of problem involved
